attributes.description: NirSoft visits to insider-threat-flagged categories — same canonical tag set used by the Hindsight parser so behavior is consistent across tools. Covers: file-sharing services (Dropbox/Box/Mega/WeTransfer/etc.), personal cloud (Google Drive, OneDrive personal, iCloud, Proton), webmail (Gmail/Outlook.com/Yahoo Mail/Proton Mail), AI assistants (ChatGPT/Claude/Gemini/Copilot/Perplexity), job sites (LinkedIn jobs, Indeed, Glassdoor, etc.), and canary tokens.

kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON: {"filter":[],"highlightAll":true,"indexRefName":"kibanaSavedObjectMeta.searchSourceJSON.index","query":{"language":"kuery","query":"browser.source_tool : \"nirsoft_browsinghistoryview\" and (tags : browser_file_sharing or tags : browser_cloud_personal or tags : browser_webmail or tags : browser_ai_assistant or tags : browser_job_site or tags : browser_canary_token)"},"version":true}

attributes.title: NirSoft: EXFIL CHANNELS (file-sharing, personal cloud, webmail, AI, jobs, canary)
